gameTitle: The Legend of Heroes: A Tear of Vermillion

achievements.title: Best Friends Forever
achievements.description: Mile and Avin are now grown and decide to depart to find Eimelle together
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Setting Off on a Long Road
achievements.description: Avin and Mile prove their worth and leave on their journey to find Eimelle
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Ginkgo Round Dance
achievements.description: Obtained Swordmaster 1 book from Alsa
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Unofficial History of El Phildin
achievements.description: Read a book in the Phildin library that adds a history entry
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: First Test Complete!
achievements.description: Avin and Mile complete the first quest in their test to become Adventurers
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Friends Reunited
achievements.description: Found Bang Bang and returned him to Fururu (albeit a bit dirty) and completed the second test.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Opening of War
achievements.description: Obtain the Swordmaster 2 book from Fururu's mom
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Adventurers At Last!
achievements.description: Avin and Mile complete the final test and become Adventurers
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: It Will Always Start With Bandits
achievements.description: Save Tibri Village from bandits
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Rookie Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests found in chapter 1 (Gemstone Stope, Tibri Hwy, Ziziki Mtn Path, Ziziki Cave and Prayer Woods)
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: In The Midst of a Conflict Between Powers
achievements.description: Complete chapter 1 upon learning of Octum's Apostles and why Eimelle is sought out
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Winner!
achievements.description: Win first prize in the raffle and exchange the ticket for a Treasure Sword Kasnard before meeting Douglas
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: He'll Be Famous!
achievements.description: Upon reporting about the capture of bandits to the guild, receive an invite to be Borun's representative for the Water Match
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Swordsmaster
achievements.description: Receive Swordmaster 3 from Paan in Borun
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Bittersweet Reunion
achievements.description: Reunite with Ollesia after many years
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Cute Way of Clearing the Air
achievements.description: Save the Meefas and New Borun
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Business Influencer
achievements.description: Advise Ramicum in New Borun on what type of shop he should open.  It can be any of the three types of shops.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Wandering With Wind
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 1 from Jyamane in New Borun.  Must have found Jyamane and Karamus in Phildin, Borun and New Borun previously
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Anything for Eimelle
achievements.description: Get tricked by a fake letter and find out who Rouca's sister actually is.  Now to follow the actual lead.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Autumn Rain
achievements.description: Obtain Swordmaster 4 from Max
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Guia Saved
achievements.description: Fend off the monsters attacking Guia and save Rouca and in the process gain another lead to find Eimelle
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Well Earned Reward
achievements.description: Receive 2000 Rozes in payment for defending Guia even if Avin doesn't think he deserves it.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Change of Plan
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 2 from Jyamane in Guia
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Joyful Reunion
achievements.description: After Avin and Eimelle finally meet up again see all the scenes with Mile, Avin and Eimelle before returning to Baron Conrad's
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Witchcraft Master
achievements.description: Obtain Swordmaster 5 from the sailor in Balloa
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Interception
achievements.description: Obtain Quick Ravin 3 from Jyamane in Balloa
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Save the Miners and Make History!
achievements.description: Save the miners from the monsters and get the bugged history entry.  Start with clearing out the right tunnel to avoid missing it.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Syamseal Gang Brought to Justice at Last!
achievements.description: Defeat Fatima
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Monster Carts Sure Are Bad Luck For Avin
achievements.description: Wake up in Valkd after an accident while traveling from Theta to Valkd
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Knowledge of the Enemy
achievements.description: Find the optional history entry in Reference Room One in Valkd Grand Cathedral
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Terrible Truth and an Unexpected Twist
achievements.description: Avin discovers a terrible truth and is saved by an unexpected person
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Gawaine the Hero
achievements.description: Talk to Arts in the town of Valkd after Gawaine joins to gain a missable history entry
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Dark Eyes
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 4 from Jyamane in Theta
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Start of an Odd Friendship
achievements.description: Avin convinces Rutice to join him
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Experienced Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Loot all the treasure chests in chapter 2 (Capital Passage, Torkas Passage, Torkas Cave, Tree Spirit Forest, Golda Cave, Anol Highway, Road to Richness, and Icon Passage)
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Revelation of an Ancient Tribe
achievements.description: With some help from Michel, receive a revelation about the sacred treasures and report back the Croir, completing chapter 2 at last
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Turn For the Worse
achievements.description: Obtain Swordmaster 6 from Kurason in Valkd
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Chorus of Insects
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 5 in Valkd Grand Cathedral (must tell stories to Karamus in Dorx and Valkd first)
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Beaten by a Kid
achievements.description: With some help from Jimmy, deal with the monsters being summoned to Pregon Cave
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Scotia of Beautiful Water
achievements.description: Restore Scotia to her original form, obtain the sacred treasure Dellepied and Scotia's power along with saving Lita
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: An Unexpected Encounter
achievements.description: Receive Swordmaster 7 from Cerine in Quitt Village
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Another Well-Earned Reward
achievements.description: Receive 3000 Roze from Chief Godal for helping the village
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: In a Tight Corner
achievements.description: Receive Swordmaster 8 from Neil in Dorx
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Foregone Dreams
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 6 from Jyamane in Theta
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Continuity Nod
achievements.description: Have a chat with Karamus in Theta and find out that Lucias was the star of Sapphie, the series of another game
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Save the Baron!
achievements.description: Assist Baron Conrad in defeating some of Octum's Apostles
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Decision
achievements.description: Received Swordmaster 9 from Sion at the Sorcery School
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Loss of Hope
achievements.description: In the Ice Palace, Avin has a dream that confirms his worst fears and asks him to save someone
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Monument in the Mine
achievements.description: Find and read the stone monument in the depths of Guia Mine to gain an optional history entry.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Happy Sibling Reunion
achievements.description: Defeat the hooded sorcerer, saving Rouca and the plant manager and also putting a stop to monsters being summoned in the mine.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Atoning for Her Sins
achievements.description: After clearing Guia Mine of monsters, speak with Oldwoman Rao in her home
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Duel
achievements.description: Receive Swordmaster 10 from a meefa in Garden Hill after the air is cleaned
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Idun of Gentle Wind
achievements.description: Restore Idun back to normal, gain the fourth sacred treasure and the power of the wind.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Eimelle's Friends Saved!
achievements.description: Assist with dealing with an attack on Benequia Monastery by Octum's Apostles
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Avin the Mail Carrier
achievements.description: Receive a reward for delivering a letter to Linde's grandmother
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Flashing Sword
achievements.description: Receive Swordmaster 11 from the librarian in Phildin
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: He Truly is Famous!
achievements.description: Have Muse introduce Avin to the King and see how famous Avin has become.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Time For More History
achievements.description: Gain all the optional history entries from Phildin Castle's library
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Fond Remembrance
achievements.description: While in the Ziziki Cave to get the Firefly Mushroom, revisit the area where the Syamseal Gang was previously found
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Fungus Among Us
achievements.description: Defeat the monsters and obtain the Firefly Mushroom.  Clearly monsters love fungus.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Knowledge of Phildin's Past
achievements.description: After obtaining the Jenis Water, talk to Oldman Loberus in Phildin to get the last missable history entry.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Girl
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 7 from Jyamane in Phildin
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Nephtys of the Harvested Earth
achievements.description: Restore Nephtys back to normal, gain power and another sacred treasure
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Fall of the Swordsmaster
achievements.description: Receive Swordmaster 12 from Luc in Brizahc
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Gems in the Peat
achievements.description: Find all five of the egg sized Crimson Fires in the Eiton Cave
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Sorcerer
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 8 from Jyamane in Brizahc
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Blade of Carnage
achievements.description: Madram challenges Avin to a duel to see who should hold the sacred treasures
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Gift 15 Years in the Making
achievements.description: Borgeid is defeated once and for all
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Holy Sword, Elucion
achievements.description: Meet with Zar, gain the last sacred treasure, his power and the Holy Sword Elucion
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Thoughts Handed Down
achievements.description: Visit Dominique's grave again after obtaining the Holy Sword
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Finding Hope in a Storm
achievements.description: Receive Quick Ravin 9 from Jyamane in Valkd
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Quick Ravin Collector
achievements.description: Trade all nine Quick Ravin books to Duke Aron for a Moon Amulet
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Swordmaster Collector
achievements.description: Trade all volumes of Swordmaster to Muche for the Zero Field accessory
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Bond That Can Never Be Broken
achievements.description: Reunite with Mile
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Expert Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in chapters 3 and 4 (Quitt Byway, Pregon Cave, Scotia Shrine, Grand Canyon, Idun Shrine, Notos Forest, Nephtys Shrine, Valkd Cathedral, Eiton Cave, Zar Shrine and Sealed Land)  Refilled chests do not count.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: To Lay A Path of Hope
achievements.description: Beat the game and watch the ending
achievements.author: LadyNadia
